top_signals.title: Japan’s Nikkei 225 tops 64,000 for first time as oil falls on Hormuz reopening hopes
top_signals.summary: Japan’s Nikkei 225 breached 64,000 for the first time Monday as a sharp decline in oil prices lifted risk sentiment in holiday-thinned trading.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: China launches crewed space flight as part of moon ambitions
top_signals.summary: A key experiment will be one of the crew staying for a year in orbit to study the effects of a long stay in microgravity as part of China's preparations for future lunar missions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
